definitions.text: Of, relating to, produced by, operated with, or utilising electricity; electrical.
Of or relating to an electronic version of a musical instrument that has an acoustic equivalent.

examples: We had to sit in the dark because the electric was cut off.

definitions.text: An electric powered version of something that was originally or is more commonly not electric. An electric car, locomotive, train etc. An electric toothbrush. An electric typewriter.
An electric car, locomotive, train etc.
